'''Tenticulons''' were natural predators of the [[firehead]] fish, who lurks in the half-light [[Water/Legends|waters]] beneath the polar ice sheets on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Rhinnal/Legends|Rhinnal]]. Their enormous body is an amorphous blob towing dozens of ribbon-like arms, each with a specialized function. Some [[Bioluminescence/Legends|limbs]] blink to bewitch passing [[Fish/Legends|fish]], others sting, and still others grasp and rend. The creatures are capable of rapidly regenerating lost appendages. If the tenticulon hits its target with at least five grasping tentacles, it can swallow the victim whole.

Many residents of Rhinnal consider the tenticulon a myth; its existence remains (in their eyes) unproven. Others disagree, positing that the creature typically does not fight what it cannot kill.

==Behind the scenes==
Tenticulons were introduced in ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', a sourcebook for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] on [[January 3]], [[2003]]. The sourcebook offered players several adventure hooks for their home campaigns. One such scenario, titled «Frozen in Time», pits a group of players against [[firehead]]s and tenticulons.
